source_meta.source_document: CPT 12/14 Hip System Surgical Technique and Trident II product materials

TRAYS.Tray Notes: The CPT surgical technique describes dedicated femoral preparation instrumentation and Trident materials describe simplified acetabular tray configurations.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe the polished tapered cobalt-chromium CPT stem family with multiple offsets and long-stem options.
The CPT 12/14 taper supports a range of compatible femoral head options.
Official Trident materials describe the acetabular shell family used with the hybrid construct.
Official Trident materials describe X3 polyethylene and related liner options.

row.system_notes: Hybrid total hip arthroplasty construct combining the cemented CPT polished taper stem family with the Trident acetabular system.
